title: arabis supina
intro: Arabis supina, also known as rock cress or northern rock cress, is a perennial herb in the mustard family that is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arabis supina include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support respiratory health. Arabis supina can be prepared as an herbal remedy through teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in modern herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions, including bronchitis and respiratory infections.
